title: Dye Casting (Hex Casting x Dye Depot Compat)
description: A resource pack that adds compatibility between Dye Depot and Hex Casting.
body:
This is a resource pack that adds compatibility between Hex Casting and Dye Depot. This means that your precious pigments won't have missing textures and models.

This also renames Light Blue and Light Gray pigments to their respective color override counterparts. (Sky and Ash)

This is meant to go with [Dye Casting Recipes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dye-casting-recipes), its companion data pack.
